title: Eleuterio Rodolfi

infobox.value: This biographical article related to film in Italy is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Eleuterio_Rodolfi&action=edit).

(1876–1933) was an Italian actor, [screenwriter](/wiki/Screenwriter "Screenwriter") and [film director](/wiki/Film_director "Film director"). He was a leading figure in [Italian cinema](/wiki/Cinema_of_Italy "Cinema of Italy") during the [silent era](/wiki/Silent_era "Silent era"), directing over a hundred films including *[The Last Days of Pompeii](/wiki/The_Last_Days_of_Pompeii_(1913_film) "The Last Days of Pompeii (1913 film)")* (1913).[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

| Eleuterio Rodolfi | |
| --- | --- |
| Eleuterio Rodolfi in 1925 | |
| Born | (1876-01-28)28 January 1876  [Bologna](/wiki/Bologna "Bologna"), Italy |
| Died | 19 December 1933(1933-12-19) (aged 57)  [Brescia](/wiki/Brescia "Brescia"), Italy |
| Occupations | Director   Screenwriter   Actor |
| Years active | 1911–1924 |

*La meridiana del convento* (1916)

**Eleuterio Rodolfi** (1876–1933) was an Italian actor, [screenwriter](/wiki/Screenwriter "Screenwriter") and [film director](/wiki/Film_director "Film director"). He was a leading figure in [Italian cinema](/wiki/Cinema_of_Italy "Cinema of Italy") during the [silent era](/wiki/Silent_era "Silent era"), directing over a hundred films including *[The Last Days of Pompeii](/wiki/The_Last_Days_of_Pompeii_(1913_film) "The Last Days of Pompeii (1913 film)")* (1913).[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Selected filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Eleuterio_Rodolfi&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected filmography")]

### Director

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Eleuterio_Rodolfi&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Director")]

* *[The Last Days of Pompeii](/wiki/The_Last_Days_of_Pompeii_(1913_film) "The Last Days of Pompeii (1913 film)")* (1913)
* *[Doctor Antonio](/wiki/Doctor_Antonio_(1914_film) "Doctor Antonio (1914 film)")* (1914)
* *[Hamlet](/wiki/Hamlet_(1917_film) "Hamlet (1917 film)")* (1917)
* *[The Little Schoolmistress](/wiki/The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1919_film) "The Little Schoolmistress (1919 film)")* (1919)
* *[Maciste's American Nephew](/wiki/Maciste%27s_American_Nephew "Maciste's American Nephew")* (1924)

### Producer

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Eleuterio_Rodolfi&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Producer")]

* *[The Painting of Osvaldo Mars](/wiki/The_Painting_of_Osvaldo_Mars "The Painting of Osvaldo Mars")* (1921)
